mapper.select: select concat(WI.COMPKEY, WI.WAREKEY, WI.PASTRKY, WI.PASTRIT) as ROWKEY , WI.COMPKEY, WI.WAREKEY, WI.PASTRKY , WI.PASTRIT, WI.PASTROD, WI.PASTRMD , WI.RCVLOCA, WM.RCVLOYN , WI.RCVZONE, WM.RCVZNYN , WI.RCVSABC, WM.RCVABYN , WI.PAWLOCA, WM.PAWLCYN , WI.PAWZONE, WM.PAWZNYN , WI.SCHMETH, WM.SCHMEYN , WI.SCHSFNO, WM.SCHSFYN , WI.SCHEFNO, WM.SCHEFYN , WI.SCHMXOP, WM.SCHMXYN , WI.SCHLROP, WM.SCHLRYN , WI.PADELYN , date_format(WI.CREDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as CREDATE, date_format(WI.CRETIME, '%H-%i-%s') as CRETIME, fn_sy_usernam(WI.COMPKEY, WI.CREUSER) as CREUSER , date_format(WI.LMODATE, '%Y-%m-%d') as LMODATE, date_format(WI.LMOTIME, '%H-%i-%s') as LMOTIME, fn_sy_usernam(WI.COMPKEY, WI.LMOUSER) as LMOUSER , WI.INDIBZL, WI.INDIARC, WI.UPDTCHK from WPASIT WI inner join WPASMA WM on WI.COMPKEY = WM.COMPKEY and WI.PASTRMD = WM.PASTRMD where WI.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and WI.WAREKEY = #{warekey} and WI.PASTRKY = #{pastrky} order by WI.COMPKEY, WI.WAREKEY, WI.PASTRKY, WI.PASTROD

select COMPKEY , PASTRMD , PASTRNM , RCVLOYN , RCVZNYN , RCVABYN , PAWLCYN , PAWZNYN , SCHMEYN , SCHSFYN , SCHEFYN , SCHMXYN , SCHLRYN , PADELYN from WPASMA where COMPKEY = #{compkey}
and PASTRMD = #{pastrmd}

update.foreach: update WPAORD set PAORDOD = ifnull(#{item.paordod},' ') , PASTRKY = ifnull(#{item.pastrky},' ') , DOCTYPE = ifnull(#{item.doctype},' ') , OWNERKY = ifnull(#{item.ownerky},' ') , SKUMKEY = ifnull(#{item.skumkey},' ') , VENDKEY = ifnull(#{item.vendkey},' ') , SKUWABC = ifnull(#{item.skuwabc},' ') , BRANDCD = ifnull(#{item.brandcd},' ') , PADELYN = ifnull(#{item.padelyn},' ') , SKUGR02 = ifnull(#{item.skugr02},' ') , SKUGR03 = ifnull(#{item.skugr03},' ') , SKUGR04 = ifnull(#{item.skugr04},' ') , LMODATE = to_char(NOW() ,'YYYYMMDD') , LMOTIME = to_char(NOW() ,'hh24miss') , LMOUSER = #{userData.useract} where COMPKEY = #{item.compkey} and WAREKEY = #{item.warekey} and PAORDIT = #{item.paordit} and UPDTCHK = #{item.updtchk}
